title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Durian Furniture

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Durian Furniture
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!
